notes: Naval capstone specialist base — the map's sole example of its kind, sited along the map's ocean edge. Its exclusive production building fields the navy's heaviest roster of warships, up to the biggest and most advanced vessel. Its specialty defense is a water-cannon turret shared with another river/coastal base. Starts with a garrison of ships but nothing that's pure cargo or the very largest vessel, and gets a boost to its water-adjacent food production.
